name: flow-hash-check
description: Daily drift detection for Workspace Studio flows. Fetches deployed flow definitions, hashes, compares to version-controlled snapshots in chittyops/studio-flows/. Alerts on diff.

trigger.note: Runs at 06:00 CT — before daily-comms-triage at 07:00. Ensures Studio flow drift detected before pipeline depends on its output.

channels.template: ⚠ Studio flow drift detected on {{account}}. Compare in chittyops repo.

schema_addition.$comment: If table doesn't exist, create it as part of Phase 4 migrations:
schema_addition.ddl: CREATE TABLE chittyops.studio_flow_drift_log (drift_id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), account text NOT NULL, flow_id text NOT NULL, expected_hash text NOT NULL, actual_hash text NOT NULL, diff_summary text, detected_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(), resolved_at timestamptz, resolution text);

notes: Auto-revert NOT enabled in v1 — operator decides whether drift is intended (manual edit in Studio UI) or unintended (third-party change).
Resolution path: either commit new flow JSON to chittyops/studio-flows/ (intended) or revert the Studio flow to match snapshot (unintended).
Address F-R15: covers Studio's vendor-side mutability risk.
